---
name: good
description: Use when you need a tidy example skill for review-skills tests.
---

# Good skill

A minimal, well-formed skill used as a clean fixture for the
review-skills collectors.

## Usage

Run the skill against any path. Then inspect the emitted score.

## Instructions

1. Read the target file.
2. Score the target file.
3. Report the result.

## Examples

```bash
review-skills audit ./good
```
